title: Numina
description: Support library for Modular Powersuits, possibly other mods in the future.
body:
Numina is a library that includes common functionality for all my mods, and a few extra utilities that people have requested.
 

Recipes

- Define recipes in a straightforward, easy-to-edit JSON format.

- Recipes are downloaded automatically from the server when you connect, so server owners can disable or change certain recipes or even add new ones without having to make a separate modpack!

 

Other Tweaks

- Field of View fix: Especially with modded minecraft, you end up going quite fast, and the vanilla behaviour of changing your field of view can get nauseating. This hack makes sure your field of view is always set to a reasonable amount.
